text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Argh, I let a rule-breaker get away! I<n>can't believe
I did that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Inari, you gotta give me a good<n>tongue-lashing!
Otherwise, I'll always be<n>a worthless
good-for-nothing!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! Quit bein' a blockhead.<n>You want
me to set you straight? No way<n>I can do that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Take a good look at yourself! You do a<n>kick-ass
job—straight as an arrow.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You never turned your back from the<n>righteous
path, so what's there to be<n>ashamed of?! Now
stand up tall and walk<n>with some pride, will ya?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Get it? There's always next time! Just be<n>prepared
and get it right with the next<n>one!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh, you never let me down! You got<n>a heart of
gold! You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I couldn't ask for anyone<n>better! Now lay
it on me! Give me a<n>good scolding!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Uhh... Did ya listen to a single word Isaid?
